paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.75, representing a 10.21 percent increase from the prior close, but a 24.8 percent decrease over the past 21 sessions. The price change is as of July 21, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings, with recent filings including a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K filings, one of which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
